notes: Reliability and safety update. An explicit camera flame detection now always sounds the alarm and alerts your trusted contacts, even at low confidence, and a flame the vision service labels differently is no longer missed. Adds a local-only privacy mode for data-residency regions, per-country emergency numbers on the emergency screen, and larger, clearer alert controls. Also fixes cross-device sync of your region and quiet hours, stops a signed-out shared phone from receiving a previous account's alerts, and improves overall stability.
